passages.passage_text:
Directions (Q. Nos. 22-23) Read the following information carefully to answers the questions that follow.
Two boys Anil and Shyam walk in opposite directions for 3 km. Anil is walking towards East. After 3 km each, both turn right and again walk 3 km each. Both turn to face each other.

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Raman starts from point P and walks towards South and stops at point Q. He now takes a right turn followed by a left turn and stops at point R. He finally takes a left turn and stops at point S. If he walks 5 km before taking each turn, towards which direction will Raman have to walk from point S to reach point Q?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Town D is to the West of town M. Town R is to the South of town D. Town K is to the East of town R. Town X is towards which direction of town D?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Rama travels a distance of 5 km from a place A towards North, turns left and walks 3 km, again turns right and walks 2 km. Finally he turns right and walks 3 km to reach the place B. What is the distance between A and B?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A started from a place, after walking for 1 km, he turns to the left, then walking for 1/2 km, he again turns to left. Now, he is going Eastward direction. In which direction, did he original start?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Starting from a point M, Harish walked 18 m towards South. He turned to his left and walked 25 m. He, then turned to his left and walked 25 m. He, then turned to his left and walked 18 m. He again turned to his left and walked 35 m and reached point P. What is the direction of P in respect of M?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Shehnaz wants to go to the market. She starts from her home which is in North and comes to the crossing. The road to her left goes South-East and straight ahead is the office complex. In which direction is the market to the crossing?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The town of Paranda is located on Green lake. The town of Akram is West of Paranda. Tokhada is East of Akram but West of Paranda. Kokran is East of Bopri but West of Tokhada and Akram. If they are all in the same district, which town is the farthest West?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: The houses of A and B face each other on a road going North-South, A's being on the western side. A comes out of his house, turns left, travels 5 km, turns right, travels 5 km to the front of D's house. B does exactly the same and reaches the front of C's house. In this context, which one of the following statements is correct?

choices.a: C and D live on the same street
choices.c: The houses of C and D are less than 20 km apart

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: A window in a house faces East. When the Sun shines through, it shines on the wall opposite. In which direction does the outside of this wall face?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: Anita drives from point A towards North and travels 30 km. She then turns to her right and travels 4 km and then again turns to the right and drives straight for 30 km. How much distance she has to cover to go straight to the starting point?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In which direction is Shyam looking?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: In which direction is Anil looking?

questions.subject: verbal
questions.body: I am standing at the centre of a circular field. I go down South to the edge of the field and then turning the left I walk along the boundary, turning inward after three-eights of its length. Then, I turn left and go right across to the opposite point on the boundary. In which direction am I from the starting point?
